failures.description: The agent misinterpreted or failed to use the ProductCatalogSearch output. The tool result clearly showed 4 matching items, but the Executor produced an unsupported answer saying there were 11 options and referenced a nonexistent record.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool call was made successfully and returned 4 matching items. At step 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming there are 11 options and citing record 0000000000, which contradicts the tool output and ignores the actual returned count/items. This failure was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the bad answer despite mentioning the correct count of 4.
